title: Focus control group relayout with AE-L and MF around lens strip

implemented: Moved Focus entry model from independent AF/MF/LOCK panel to lens control group
Added AE-L capsule on the left side of lens focal controls
Added MF capsule on the right side of lens focal controls
Disabled independent Focus status capsule as a main entry
Disabled independent AF/MF/LOCK Focus panel as a main entry
Added MF single-button local mode toggle
Restored AF by calling cameraRuntime.restoreAutofocusMode() when leaving MF
not_implemented: Focus returned to bottom five-parameter bar

mf_behavior.tap_mf_when_unlocked: enter local MF mode and highlight MF
mf_behavior.tap_mf_when_active: exit MF, call restoreAutofocusMode(), unhighlight MF

gesture_policy.tap_preview_in_mf_mode: consumed with hint to avoid AF overriding MF mode

contracts_protected.five_parameters: EV / WB / TINT / ISO / S unchanged

xcodebuild.command: xcodebuild -project /Users/sungning/Projects/SellerCamera/SellerCamera.xcodeproj -scheme SellerCamera -configuration Debug -destination "generic/platform=iOS Simulator" CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build

risks: Lens strip may be tight on small screens with AE-L and MF capsules.
MF is currently a local mode toggle and does not write lensPosition.
AE-L reuses the existing exposure lock path and is not a new independent runtime contract.
MF tap-preview consumption policy should be validated on device.
next_recommended_package: R59 Manual Focus low-position ruler integration with lensPosition write loop
